name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atlassian Confluence Spawning
notes:
This Building Block detects spawning of suspicious child processes by Atlassian Confluence server which may indicate successful exploitation.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bhabesh Raj
SIGMA Title: Atlassian Confluence CVE-2021-26084
SIGMA Description: Detects spawning of suspicious child processes by Atlassian Confluence server which may indicate successful exploitation of CVE-2021-26084


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atlassian Confluence Spawning on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of \Atlassian\Confluence\jre\bin\java.exe

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd /c%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd /k%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%powershell%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%certutil%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%curl%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%whoami%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ipconfig%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Atlassian Confluence Spawning on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Parent Process Path (custom) contains any of \Atlassian\Confluence\jre\bin\java.exe

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd /c%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cmd /k%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%powershell%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%certutil%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%curl%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%whoami%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ipconfig%' AQL filter query
